hero.title: Your media, your rules
hero.subtitle: Mhaoltube is an open-source alternative YouTube client that puts you in control. Download videos, build your library, and enjoy your content without compromises.

features.heading: Everything you need
features.subheading: A complete media toolkit built for power users who value freedom and privacy.

download.title: YouTube Downloads
download.description: Download videos and audio directly from YouTube. Save content for offline viewing in your preferred format and quality.

search.title: YouTube Search
search.description: Search and browse YouTube content natively within the app. No browser needed, no tracking, no ads.

library.title: Media Libraries
library.description: Organize your downloaded media into libraries. Tag, categorize, and browse your collection with a clean interface.

player.title: Built-in Player
player.description: Play your media with a fully integrated player. Supports video and audio playback with a minimal, distraction-free UI.

addons.title: Addon System
addons.description: Extend functionality with addons for lyrics, music metadata, movie info, and more. The plugin architecture lets you customize your experience.

crossplatform.title: Cross-Platform
crossplatform.description: Runs on macOS and Android today, with more platforms on the way. Built with Tauri for a fast, native experience everywhere.

platforms.heading: Available on your devices
platforms.subheading: Built with Tauri for native performance on every platform.

footer.built_with: Built with SvelteKit, Rust, and Tauri
